rows.label: xs32040100_MSG0030
rows.name: assisting with the design of the Ares's jump drive, you see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32040100_MSG0050
rows.name: However, we don't quite understand the Ares and Dolls very well, you see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32040100_MSG0060
rows.name: So when we consulted Vandham, he told us you were the right people for the job.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32040100_MSG0080
rows.name: In short, you want us to go to the hangar and instruct the engineers?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32040100_MSG0120
rows.name: We appreciate how fast you catch on![ST:wait ]
